attribution: Universal Newsreel, 'Hitlerites Parade In Rain', 16 March 1933 (PD)

clips.note: SA columns marching at the Brandenburg Gate — brownshirts outnumber the army / coup scare
aerial view of SA march through Brandenburg Gate — mass roundup of opponents
SA street column in the rain — the S.A. ban lifted
storm troopers saluting at reviewing stand — storm troopers seize the state governments
